title: Lem AI (getlem.ai): Lem AI: The Institutional Memory for Engineering Teams. | Product Hunt
excerpt: Lem is the Institutional Memory for engineering teams. It captures the vital context behind the code by linking your Slack chats, Jira tickets, and meeting transcripts straight to your GitHub commits. When engineers leave, their knowledge shouldn't disappear. By turning daily engineering activity into a reliable centralized ledger of truth, Lem builds an automated audit trail of every architecture decision and code change. Compliance becomes automatic, and tribal knowledge is preserved for good.

Compliance becomes automatic, and tribal knowledge is preserved for good.

sentences.en: Lem is the Institutional Memory for engineering teams.
sentences.zh: Lem 是工程团队的机构记忆。

sentences.en: It captures the vital context behind the code by linking your Slack chats, Jira tickets, and meeting transcripts straight to your GitHub commits.
sentences.zh: 它通过将您的 Slack 聊天、Jira 票证和会议记录直接链接到您的 GitHub 提交来捕获代码背后的重要上下文。

sentences.en: When engineers leave, their knowledge shouldn't disappear.
sentences.zh: 当工程师离开时，他们的知识不应该消失。

sentences.en: By turning daily engineering activity into a reliable centralized ledger of truth, Lem builds an automated audit trail of every architecture decision and code change.
sentences.zh: 通过将日常工程活动转变为可靠的集中式事实账本，Lem 为每个架构决策和代码更改构建了自动审计跟踪。

sentences.en: Compliance becomes automatic, and tribal knowledge is preserved for good.
sentences.zh: 服从变得自动，部落知识被永久保存。

content_html_zh: Lem 是工程团队的机构记忆。 它通过将您的 Slack 聊天、Jira 票证和会议记录直接链接到您的 GitHub 提交来捕获代码背后的重要上下文。 当工程师离开时，他们的知识不应该消失。 通过将日常工程活动转变为可靠的集中式事实账本，Lem 为每个架构决策和代码更改构建了自动审计跟踪。 服从变得自动，部落知识被永久保存。
